_comment: Machine-readable, EXPIRING allowlist for `npm run security:audit`. Each entry allows exactly ONE advisory (exact GHSA) on ONE package — it is NOT a package-wide mute, so a NEW advisory on the same package fails the gate. Criticals can never be excepted. An expired entry FAILS the gate. `npm run security:audit:raw` always shows the unfiltered truth and remains non-zero while any entry is in effect.

exceptions.reason: sharp is pulled in transitively by Next. next@15.5.21 (current pin, latest stable 15.5.x) still declares optionalDependencies.sharp ^0.34.3, so no forward stable Next release resolves it; npm's only 'fix' is a downgrade to next@14.2.35 (breaking and older). Not reachable in this build: the application never imports sharp, and all user media is served through the controlled /media route rather than Next's image optimizer. Re-pin Next as soon as a release declares sharp>=0.35.
exceptions.expiresNote: Earlier of 2026-08-21 or the first cloud UAT deployment, whichever comes first. Cloud UAT remains BLOCKED while this exception is in effect.
